title: interest on reserve balances / iorb / fed policy rate | Market Notice | Interest on Reserve Balances (IORB) Rate
summary: The Interest on Reserve Balances (IORB) rate stands at 3.65% as of April 13, 2026, unchanged from the prior reading on April 12. The rate has remained flat at 3.65% since April 9, 2026. This is a daily data series snapshot rather than a policy announcement.
